rows.label: tev020801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev020801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Sarona about maps.

rows.label: tev020801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev020801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Sarona if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Sarona about the Landbanker Union.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Sarona for her
thoughts on the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Sarona for her
opinion of the Growth.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Sarona about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1031
rows.name:
Ask Sarona for her thoughts
on the Growth's weaponry.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1041
rows.name:
Ask Sarona about conditions
during the enemy attack.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1051
rows.name:
Ask Sarona for her
thoughts on the Larsians.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1061
rows.name:
Ask Sarona about her
experiences with the Larsians.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1071
rows.name: Ask Sarona about the Central Life.

rows.label: tev020801_SEL1081
rows.name: Ask Sarona what she intends to do next.

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Huh. You're that new crew
member they found, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0002
rows.name:
So what do you think? Isn't this town huge?
But as big as it seems, Mira is a whole lot
bigger— so don't go running off half-cocked.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0003
rows.name:
That comm device you're holding can display a
map of the surrounding area. If you lose your
bearings, just fire it up and take a look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0004
rows.name:
The triangle is your current position, the teal
dots are your fellow team members, and the white
dots are people like me. As for Dolls...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, you don't have one of those yet, so
never mind! But when you do get one, take
a look at your map and see for yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0008
rows.name:
You've heard of Talon Rock, right? That big rocky
mountain in the northern part of Primordial Wilderness?
It's that big spire you can even see from the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0009
rows.name:
That area hasn't been fully explored
yet, so Eleonora is always nagging us
to get out there and do a survey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0010
rows.name:
But the Talon Rock mountain is swarming with
dangerous indigens, which makes it a big hassle.
We've been kicking that can down the road forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0011
rows.name:
But now they aren't even offering
us any other missions, so we basically
have no choice BUT to do it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0012
rows.name:
That Eleonora has the face of an
angel, but she's doing the devil's
work in that receptionist's guise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0020
rows.name:
As a member of the Landbanker Union, my
primary duty is finding and collecting the
minerals and other resources of Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0021
rows.name:
To do that, we explore each
region, plant data probes, and
perform other related tasks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0022
rows.name:
I volunteered to join the Union because I thought it
sounded easy—I didn't want to have to be fighting
dangerous indigens, like the Avalanche and Interceptor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0023
rows.name:
But it's a heck of a lot tougher than I'd thought!
Scientific research can't advance without resources,
so we have BLADE HQ on our backs constantly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0024
rows.name:
Although I suppose if we're gonna
live on this planet forever, then
someone's gotta do this sort of thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0046
rows.name:
Those little xenos are wandering around
the administrative district as we speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0047
rows.name:
Is that really okay? My friend was saying
they might secretly be trying to conquer
NLA from that big ol' ship of theirs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0048
rows.name:
What if that friendship
treaty is all a ruse?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0049
rows.name:
As soon as we let down our guard,
death could rain down from above![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG0050
rows.name:
And then the survivors would be subjects for
creepy alien experiments and probing! So very
much probing... Anyway, we can't let that happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1001
rows.name:
I was thinking like, maybe if we could talk to
them, we could come to understand each other
better. Just like the way Inisae and I have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1002
rows.name:
So when I ran into a Growth soldier
on a mission, I figured I'd walk right
up and try to start a dialogue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1003
rows.name:
But he was just like, "All humans must die!"
Then he started shooting at me. A lot, actually.
Anyway, I ran the hell out of there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1004
rows.name:
So I don't think we're gonna be friends
anytime soon. I guess something about us
really just bugs the crap out of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1005
rows.name:
Anyway, I'm satisfied now that no matter
how long we have to deal with them, we'll
never come to any sort of understanding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1010
rows.name:
Hey, thanks for everything you did
for us back on that mountain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1011
rows.name:
Now Inisae and I have become good
friends, and it's all because of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1012
rows.name:
A little while ago, the two of us went
out to have coffee with Eleonora at a
café in the commercial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1013
rows.name:
And imagine my surprise when Inisae
brought out another one of those Vasalt
intestines that look like chocolates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1014
rows.name:
Anyway, Eleonora was all, "Wow, I can't
believe their viscera can be cooked like
this!" Then she just dug in and gobbled it up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1015
rows.name:
There's a whole lot of scary lurking
behind that cheery smile of hers, man...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1020
rows.name:
I was just remembering that Doll thing
the creepy squid lady Goetia was riding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1021
rows.name:
Oh, and that idol of theirs we
found in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1022
rows.name:
Anyway, it made me wonder—why does
everything the Growth use have to
be so creepy and disgusting?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1023
rows.name:
And now MEREDES & Co. is selling gear that's
inspired by all that nasty junk, and folks
are lining up to buy it! It's disgusting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1024
rows.name:
I don't care how good it is on
paper, there's no way in hell I'm
touching any of that awful stuff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1030
rows.name:
I heard that the city's defenders
slew countless enemies and managed
to hold the east gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1031
rows.name:
And I also heard there was one super-strong
BLADE who even managed to take out the enemy
commander! So I asked what [ST:gender p1=his p2=her ] name was...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1032
rows.name:
And they said it was [ST:playername ]! So I was like,
holy crap! Because that's YOU![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1033
rows.name:
I mean, wow. I knew you were
good and all, but I had no
idea that you were THAT good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1034
rows.name:
You gotta keep that roll of yours
going. Go bring down the Growth
and find our Central Life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1040
rows.name:
The Larsians told us that the Growth
headquarters is in Cauldros, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1041
rows.name:
So does that mean that those guys are cool
with us now? Because if they said it with
the intention of leaving the Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1042
rows.name:
Well, then maybe we could be
friends with them, the way Inisae
and I are good friends now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1043
rows.name:
Personally, I LOVE cats, so I
think I could really get along
great with xenoforms like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1048
rows.name:
After the Larsians left the Growth
and joined us, I was pretty excited
about making friends with them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1049
rows.name:
But everything I do to befriend
them just makes them angry at me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1050
rows.name:
I've dangled Kiran catnip in front of their
noses... I've hit them in the face with big
balls of yarn... Nothing seems to work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1051
rows.name:
I don't understand it. I've raised cats all
my life! I was so sure that making friends
with a catlike species would be easy for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1052
rows.name:
I guess I'll just need to break out the big
guns. Next time maybe I'll sneak up and rub
their chins when they aren't looking...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1057
rows.name:
If you and the Pathfinder hadn't traveled to
the far reaches of Mira to install all those
data probes, we would have been in big trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1058
rows.name:
And we sure never would have figured
out that the Central Life had fallen
into the sea near Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1059
rows.name:
I know recovering it won't be easy,
but we found it, so that means
everyone's gonna be okay. ...Er, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1060
rows.name:
Let's use every resource we've
found here on Mira and go get
our real bodies back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1065
rows.name:
Now that the Growth have mostly been
destroyed, Inisae and I were thinking
about hiking across Mira together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1066
rows.name:
Just two girls going wherever
the spirit takes them! Doesn't
that sound like fun?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1067
rows.name:
We can go visit the ruins of Valley
of Oblivion, or see the fantastic
scenery of White Woods...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1068
rows.name:
Imagine actually walking around
in the picturesque areas we've
seen on the research probes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020801_MSG1069
rows.name:
Hey, you know a lot about Mira, right?
If you think of any great spots for
us to visit, you gotta clue me in![ST:wait ]
